title: Bangladesh: Tarique Rahman-led govt transfers 'pro-Pak & pro-Jamaat' army officers

High-level officers facing criticism for their alleged pro-Pakistan and pro-Jamaat roles have been transferred. This move strengthens the position of army chief Waker-Uz-Zaman. The government is also ending services of contractual appointees from the interim government, breaking old chains of influence.

title: Shoes outside! Silicon Valley startups adopt desi habit

Startups like Cursor and Spur are adopting this policy, with leaders citing a desire to create a more comfortable, home-like atmosphere and practical benefits like cleanliness. This shift reflects the lingering influence of remote work habits on corporate culture.
